basics.name: Shi-Ming Wang
basics.summary: Computer Science PhD candidate at National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University working on medical imaging, quantitative MRI, AI, computational neuroimaging, and scientific computing.

work.company: Brain and Cognitive Sciences Lab, National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University
work.summary: Built graph neural network models and multimodal MRI pipelines for dementia prediction and brain network analysis.
highlights: Designed GCN, GAT, and GraphSAGE models in PyTorch for MCI-to-dementia conversion prediction.
Built morphological similarity networks across 100+ brain regions using multimodal MRI features.
Processed more than 500 subjects and approximately 3 TB of imaging data using Python, Nipype, and HPC workflows.

work.company: UCL Centre for Medical Image Computing
work.summary: Developed longitudinal diffusion MRI analysis workflows for subacute and chronic stroke cohorts.
highlights: Applied advanced microstructural MRI models to longitudinal stroke data.
Presented the work as an oral scientific session at ISMRM 2022.

work.company: Laboratory of Magnetic Resonance Research, Chang Gung University
work.summary: Worked on Parkinson's disease neuroimaging using fixel-based analysis and deep learning.
highlights: Co-developed a CNN-based classifier using diffusion MRI features.
Contributed to a first-author NeuroImage: Clinical publication on longitudinal fixel-based analysis.

education.institution: National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University

publications.name: White matter microstructural integrity mediates associations between prenatal endocrine-disrupting chemicals exposure and intelligence in adolescents
publications.summary: First-author study on white matter microstructure, prenatal exposure, and adolescent intelligence.

publications.name: Peak width of skeletonized mean diffusivity might be a better neuroimage marker for cognitive functions in CADASIL
publications.summary: Study of diffusion MRI markers and cognitive function in NOTCH3 variant carriers and CADASIL.

publications.name: A longitudinal fixel-based analysis of white matter alterations in patients with Parkinson's disease
publications.summary: Longitudinal fixel-based analysis of white matter alterations in Parkinson's disease.

publications.name: Graph neural networks for generalized morphology-derived similarity networks: taxonomy, validation, and translational risk
Multimodal gray and white matter MRI phenotypes of three-year dementia conversion in mild cognitive impairment
Microstructure-enriched morphometric similarity networks reveal cortical network remodeling associated with near-term dementia conversion
Domain-aware graph learning for MCI-to-dementia conversion across ADNI and local morphometric similarity networks

presentations.name: Brain microstructural changes in stroke patients at subacute/chronic stages by means of advanced diffusion MRI
Learning-based approach for accelerated IVIM imaging in the placenta

teaching.institution: Chang Gung University, Department of Medical Imaging and Radiological Science
teaching.description: Teaching assistantship from February 2018 to January 2019.

portfolio.name: Dementia Conversion Prediction with Graph Neural Networks
portfolio.description: GNN-based MCI-to-dementia conversion prediction using ADNI pretraining and ILAS fine-tuning.

portfolio.name: Multiparametric Morphological Similarity Networks
portfolio.description: Graph construction and topological analysis from multimodal MRI features.
